near_miss_rows.label_rationale: Aspartate-ammonia ligase performs ATP-dependent ligation chemistry outside the current hydrolase and PLP seed fingerprints.
Methionine adenosyltransferase performs ATP-dependent adenosyl transfer and triphosphate processing outside the current seed fingerprints.

rows.label_rationale: Sulfite oxidase uses molybdenum-centered sulfite oxidation with heme electron transfer, outside the current heme peroxidase or oxidase seed.
Aerobic carbon monoxide dehydrogenase uses molybdenum-copper CO oxidation chemistry outside the current hydrolase, flavin, and heme seed fingerprints.
Catechol oxidase is a copper-dependent oxidase and does not match the current metal-dependent hydrolase or heme/flavin redox seed fingerprints.
Adenylate cyclase performs metal-assisted cyclic phosphate formation from ATP, not metal-activated hydrolysis in the current seed set.
Purine nucleoside phosphorylase performs phosphorolysis rather than the current hydrolase seed mechanisms.
Pyrimidine-nucleoside phosphorylase performs phosphorolysis rather than the current hydrolysis seed mechanisms.
L-fucose isomerase uses metal-associated sugar isomerization rather than metal-activated hydrolysis in the current seed set.
Class II fructose-bisphosphate aldolase uses metal-assisted aldol carbon-carbon bond chemistry rather than metal-activated hydrolysis.
Pentalenene synthase performs terpene cyclization chemistry outside the current hydrolase and redox seed fingerprints.
Methanol dehydrogenase uses PQQ/cytochrome-linked redox chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
UDP-glucose-hexose-1-phosphate uridylyltransferase performs nucleotide-sugar transfer chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Glutamate racemase uses cysteine acid-base racemization chemistry, which is not represented by the current seed fingerprints.
6-pyruvoyltetrahydropterin synthase performs rearrangement/elimination chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Quinoprotein glucose dehydrogenase uses PQQ-dependent glucose oxidation outside the current flavin, heme, cobalamin, and hydrolase seed fingerprints.
Citrate synthase performs CoA thioester condensation chemistry rather than the current hydrolase or redox seed mechanisms.
Glycine amidinotransferase performs group transfer chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Malate synthase combines metal-assisted carbon-carbon bond formation with thioester processing, outside the current coarse hydrolase seed.
DNA topoisomerase type III uses DNA strand-cleavage and religation chemistry rather than the current metal-dependent hydrolase seed.
Lactoylglutathione lyase uses metal-assisted lyase/isomerization chemistry rather than metal-activated hydrolysis.
Methylmalonyl-CoA epimerase uses metal-associated acid-base epimerization rather than the current hydrolase seed mechanisms.
Phosphatidylinositol-specific phospholipase C chemistry is not represented by the current seed fingerprints.
Bis(5'-adenosyl)-triphosphatase uses HIT-superfamily histidine nucleotidyl hydrolase chemistry not represented by the current metal or Ser-His-Asp/Glu hydrolase seeds.
N-carbamoylsarcosine amidase is not confidently mapped to a current seed fingerprint without a more specific amidase fingerprint.
Acyl-carrier-protein UDP-N-acetylglucosamine O-acyltransferase performs acyl transfer chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Type I 3-dehydroquinate dehydratase uses Schiff-base-assisted dehydration chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
NAD+ ADP-ribosyltransferase performs ADP-ribosyl transfer chemistry outside the current hydrolase and redox seed fingerprints.
Protein-tyrosine phosphatase uses cysteine phosphatase chemistry rather than the current metal-dependent or Ser-His-Asp hydrolase seeds.
3-hydroxydecanoyl-ACP dehydratase performs dehydration chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Adenylosuccinate synthase performs nucleotide-dependent ligation/addition chemistry outside the current hydrolase and PLP seed fingerprints.
Adenosylhomocysteinase uses NAD-linked chemistry outside the current flavin, cobalamin, and hydrolase seed fingerprints.
Amine dehydrogenase redox chemistry is not represented by the current seed fingerprints.
UDP-glucose 6-dehydrogenase performs NAD-dependent oxidation outside the current flavin and cobalamin redox seed fingerprints.
Uridine nucleosidase is a ribosyl hydrolase but lacks the current Ser-His-Asp/Glu hydrolase-triad seed mechanism.
Isocitrate dehydrogenase performs NADP-linked oxidation and decarboxylation, not metal-activated hydrolysis in the current seed set.
Acetyl-CoA C-acyltransferase performs carbon-carbon acyl transfer chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
4-chlorobenzoyl-CoA dehalogenase has covalent dehalogenase chemistry not represented by the current seed fingerprints.
Glucosamine-6-phosphate deaminase performs deamination and tautomerization chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Nitrile hydratase performs metal-assisted nitrile hydration rather than the ester, amide, or phosphate hydrolysis covered by the current metal hydrolase seed.
4a-hydroxytetrahydrobiopterin dehydratase performs dehydration chemistry outside the current hydrolase and heme seed fingerprints.
Phosphorylase kinase performs ATP-dependent phosphoryl transfer outside the current seed fingerprints.
Malate dehydrogenase and decarboxylating chemistry is outside the current seed fingerprints.
Cyclomaltodextrin glucanotransferase uses glycosyl transfer and glycoside chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Methylglyoxal synthase performs phosphate elimination chemistry outside the current hydrolase and redox seed fingerprints.
Aralkylamine N-acetyltransferase performs acetyl transfer chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Creatinase hydrolysis is not confidently mapped to the current metal-dependent or Ser-His-Asp/Glu hydrolase seeds from available geometry context.
Histidine decarboxylase uses pyruvoyl-dependent decarboxylation chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Glutamine-fructose-6-phosphate transaminase isomerizing performs amidotransfer/isomerization chemistry outside the current PLP seed.
Catechol 2,3-dioxygenase is a non-heme iron dioxygenase and does not match the current flavin or heme oxygenase seeds.
tRNA-pseudouridine synthase performs base rearrangement/isomerization chemistry not represented by the current seed fingerprints.
Ornithine carbamoyltransferase performs carbamoyl transfer chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Copper nitrite reductase performs metal-centered electron-transfer reduction chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Betaine-aldehyde dehydrogenase performs NAD-dependent aldehyde oxidation outside the current seed fingerprints.
Alanine dehydrogenase performs NAD-linked amino acid redox chemistry outside the current PLP and hydrolase seed fingerprints.
Adenylosuccinate lyase performs elimination/lyase chemistry outside the current hydrolase and redox seed fingerprints.
Phosphoenolpyruvate carboxykinase couples decarboxylation to ATP phosphoryl transfer rather than the current hydrolase or redox seed mechanisms.
Glutaminase-asparaginase uses N-terminal threonine amidohydrolase chemistry not represented by the current seed fingerprints.
Thymidylate synthase uses folate-dependent methyl transfer and reductive chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Dethiobiotin synthase uses ATP-dependent ring-forming ligase chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Hydroxymethylglutaryl-CoA reductase performs NADPH-dependent reductive chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
L-fuculose-phosphate aldolase uses aldol carbon-carbon bond chemistry rather than the current metal-dependent hydrolase seed.
Type II 3-dehydroquinate dehydratase performs acid-base dehydration rather than the current heme, hydrolase, or PLP seed mechanisms.
Protein-methionine-S-oxide reductase uses cysteine sulfenic-acid redox chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Vanadate-dependent chloride peroxidase is peroxidase chemistry but not the heme-dependent peroxidase or oxidase seed fingerprint.
3-dehydroquinate synthase uses NAD-linked redox, elimination, and ring-forming chemistry outside the current seed fingerprints.
Arginine kinase performs ATP-dependent phosphoryl transfer outside the current seed fingerprints.
